command_hover_target.source: current run route first waypoint with fixed z=10 m; authoritative P0 fallback when no current route CSV is available

formula_metadata.E_vel_2mps: mean_i(E_vel_i) over 10 straight velocity windows commanded at 2 m/s
formula_metadata.E_vel_selected: E_vel_2mps when all formal 2 m/s velocity windows are settled
formula_metadata.E_yaw: mean_i(E_yaw_i) over 10 yaw windows, displayed as e_att
formula_metadata.legacy_eval_window_policy: The 5 s eval window is averaged after a preceding 3 s stationarity gate; it is not re-gated as a second steady-state window.
formula_metadata.not_settled_policy: A phase that does not meet stationarity produces no formal steady-state error.
formula_metadata.outline_velocity_eval_window_policy: For comparison, velocity also reports the outline policy: first continuous 1 s within expected speed +/-2%, then mean error over the following at least 5 s eval window with no second steady gate.
formula_metadata.scope: FC-only steady-state evidence; independent of route/planner acceptance
formula_metadata.transient_policy: For each constant target phase, ignore transient response before settle_search_start; search for a stationary window, then compute error only over the following eval window.
formula_metadata.velocity_control_policy: Velocity prealign hold phases, when enabled, point yaw along the upcoming AB/BA leg and carry no evaluated component. Velocity windows request bridge mode velocity and publish MAVROS raw-local setpoints: XY velocity, Z position hold, and yaw hold along the current leg. Line endpoints define safety and scoring bounds, not XY position targets. Command speed may use a transparent gain while scoring remains against target speed.
formula_metadata.velocity_frame_policy: MAVROS Odometry twist is treated as body-frame linear velocity and rotated by current yaw into local/world XY before comparison
formula_metadata.velocity_prealign_policy: non-metric position-hold phase before every AB/BA velocity window when enabled; target yaw follows the upcoming leg direction; warning-only if final yaw remains outside tolerance

geometry_audit.audit_conclusion: SAFE: FC 3.10 A/B and decagon geometry do not intersect planner obstacles

metric_policy: Metric 3.10 is independent FC-only steady-state evidence. It is not route/planner acceptance and does not write route pass/fail or yaw pass/fail files.

position.denominator_alignment_note: All current position windows have nonzero previous-target to current-target distances.
position.outline_denominator_policy: 3D distance from previous position target to current position target
position.outline_error_policy: 3D distance between mean evaluated actual XYZ and current target XYZ

velocity.note: Legacy summary of the first velocity test; use velocity_tests for all formal speeds.

velocity_tests.command_velocity_policy: desired world XY velocity is +speed*u or -speed*u on AB legs

yaw.denominator_policy: first 8 windows use 90 deg; last 2 windows use 180 deg

topics.existing_setpoint_chain: PositionCommand on /planning/pos_cmd to bridge; FC velocity phases request velocity mode
